title: Two Years of Training Pay Off

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: Even after he swallowed all those energy steroids and became a real monster....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: No - look!! His body really is super- tough!!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Ever heard of Fish-Man Karate, boy?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hah, you see?! Just one blow, and -

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Idiot boy... He'll smash his head right open!!!

summary: Two Years of Training Pay Off. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
